title: Junior Business Analyst (Contract)
description:
• Gather, analyze, and document business requirements for FX and Money Market activities in Calypso.
  • Collaborate with the Product Owner to prioritize requirements and break them into clear user stories.
  • Convert business needs into concise functional specifications covering flows, data, and system behavior.
  • Work closely with developers to ensure solutions meet functional requirements.
  • Act as the functional point of contact, clarifying business processes and user needs.
  • Assess existing internal and external solutions for possible reuse.
  • Consider technical constraints and contribute to solution design discussions.
  • Ensure functional quality through testing and production support.
  • Evaluate the impact of changes on SLAs and OLAs.
  • Support BDD by defining user scenarios and assisting with functional tests.
  • Assist deployment activities, including pre-requisites and post-go-live checks.
  • Support and train team members and help resolve functional issues.
  • Ensure smooth integration with existing systems alongside the Functional Architect.
  • Prepare specifications, estimates, plans, test cases, and documentation.

Qualifications and Profile

  • 1–2 years of experience in Business Analysis roles.
  • Knowledge of static data, workflows, confirmations, settlements, SWIFT messages, positions, accounting, corporate actions, reporting, and reconciliation.
  • Strong understanding of FX, Money Market, and cash products trade lifecycle.
  • Experience with regulatory reporting (HRF, NORIA, MMSR).
  • Exposure to back-office systems and system integrations.
  • Familiarity with requirements lifecycle management and analysis techniques.
  • Experience acting as a liaison between onshore business teams and offshore development teams.
  • Knowledge of Agile methodologies and requirements management practices.

Functional Knowledge

  • Strong understanding of Calypso functional modules (static data, workflows, settlements, accounting, reporting, reconciliation).
  • Solid knowledge of FX, money market, and cash products lifecycle.

Nice to Have

  • Experience with Calypso versions v14 to v17.
  • Basic knowledge of UNIX, SQL, Docker, and Kubernetes.

To apply, please visit www.gmprecruit.com and search for Job Reference: 3WR596Y8

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
